changes: SECURITY: Update packages are now AES-256 encrypted — nobody can unzip or read the source code; decryption key fetched live from licensing server
IMP: Admin key-issued notifications go to a dedicated address so the main inbox stays clean
SECURITY: License keys validated server-side — revoked or pirated keys rejected by licensing server; cached 24 h for offline use
SECURITY: license_manager.py shipped as PyArmor-obfuscated bytecode — source code not readable from update package
FEATURE: Weapon alert sound & red banner — dashboard plays a 3-burst siren and shows a red banner when a weapon is detected; per-camera toggle; auto-dismisses after 30s
FIX: Children and distant people correctly detected — small-detection guard now uses aspect ratio so tall/narrow boxes (people) always pass while square ones (animals) require higher confidence
FIX: Baby animals (puppies, kittens) no longer falsely detected as persons
FIX: Person confidence threshold raised (0.75 day / 0.85 night) to reduce animal false alarms
FIX: Animal overlap suppression catches borderline dog/cat detections at lower confidence (0.15) to block nearby false person alerts
FEATURE: Camera cards now show Offline status (amber) when a connected camera loses stream
FEATURE: Active Cameras stat panel shows offline camera count or All Online status in real time
FEATURE: Dark/light mode toggle — preference saved to browser storage
FEATURE: Admin and viewer account custom usernames shown on navbar and login page
FEATURE: Audit log in Settings — last 100 login, logout, and system-change events
FEATURE: Disk full Telegram alert when disk usage reaches 85%
FEATURE: Delete All Events button in Settings
FEATURE: Per-camera animal class filter (Dog, Cat, Bird, Horse, Sheep, Cow, Bear, Elephant)
FEATURE: Telegram /sensitivity command — adjust thresholds without web UI
FEATURE: Login page shows Admin / Viewer role chooser
FEATURE: Combined per-frame Telegram alert when person + animal + vehicle detected together
FEATURE: Per-camera sensitivity, cooldown, night/IR trigger, and animal min-size sliders
CHANGE: Line Crossing merged into Zone Detection — one license covers both
FIX: Zone live view now shows real-time feed for Provision cameras
SECURITY: Session cookie secure flag auto-enables when FORCE_HTTPS env var is set
UX: Dashboard redesigned with detection breakdown, live health bars, 24h activity chart
UX: Mobile-friendly layout — camera grids, event cards, and stat panels stack on phones
